recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
recommendations.overview: Documentary filmmaker Amy Berg investigates the life of 30-year pedophile Father Oliver O'Grady and exposes the corruption inside the Catholic Church that allowed him to abuse countless children. Victims' stories and a disturbing interview with O'Gra

recommendations.title: Janis: Little Girl Blue
recommendations.overview: Janis Joplin is one of the most respected and iconic rock & roll singers of all time, a tragic and misunderstood figure who captivated millions of listeners and blazed new creative trails before her death in 1970 at age 27. Director Amy Berg explored

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: Marshland
recommendations.overview: The Spanish Deep South, 1980. A series of brutal murders of adolescent girls in a remote and forgotten town bring together two disparate characters – both detectives in the homicide division – to investigate the cases.

recommendations.title: Ordinary People
recommendations.overview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.
